title: eriogonum smithii
intro: Eriogonum smithii, also known as Smith's buckwheat or red buckwheat, is a species of flowering plant in the buckwheat family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum smithii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various conditions, including skin issues and infections.
